Maximizing Talent
Thank you for accepting the important role of Advisor!
We want people to find JOY in their work by intentionally pursuing their life’s purpose–with ongoing guidance, support, and personal accountability.
We want you as an Advisor to have a big impact yet with an efficient use of your time. By signing in you will be placed into your talent's Chat room for private discussions regarding the goals they want to achieve.

Welcome!
Koda is the career management solution focused on each individual talent.
